sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_CSM

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_5e504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc0
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_CSM</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_CSM</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_CSM = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_CSM.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"CSM","check_name":"Now Assist CSM Plugin Status","order":"10","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("sn_csm_gen_ai", "sn_csm_gen_ai");
    if (result.found) {
        return {
            status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for CSM (" + "sn_csm_gen_ai" + ") installed | version: " + result.version + " | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Now Assist for CSM is installed. Case summarization, similar case suggestions, and AI-assisted routing are available."
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: "not_ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for CSM (sn_csm_gen_ai) not found in sys_store_app or sys_plugins",
            finding: "Now Assist for CSM (sn_csm_gen_ai) not found. All Now Assist CSM AI capabilities are unavailable."
        };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for CSM requires a dedicated plugin. Without it all Now Assist CSM AI capabilities are unavailable.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Now Assist for CSM (sn_csm_gen_ai) via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm CSM Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"Customer Account and Contact Population","order":"20","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // sn_customerservice_case.state is INTEGER: 3=Closed, 6=Resolved
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in the last 12 months. Account linkage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithAcct = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaWithAcct.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaWithAcct.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaWithAcct.addQuery('account', '!=', '');
    gaWithAcct.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithAcct.query();
    var withAcct = gaWithAcct.next() ? parseInt(gaWithAcct.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withAcct / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases have account linked (last 12 months, ' + withAcct + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 90) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases are linked to an account. Now Assist CSM has strong customer context for personalized AI responses.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have an account linked (target: 90%). Now Assist CSM personalization will be limited for unlinked cases.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have an account linked. Now Assist CSM cannot provide meaningful personalized AI responses without customer account context.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Customer account and contact records are the entity anchors Now Assist CSM uses for AI-personalized responses.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure all CSM cases are linked to Account records at case creation. Enforce via mandatory field policy or case creation workflow. Import customer data from CRM systems if needed. Target: 90%+ of closed cases linked to an account.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Case Volume and History","order":"30","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' CSM cases created in last 12 months';

    if (total >= 500) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' CSM cases in the last 12 months. Sufficient history for Now Assist CSM AI summarization and pattern learning.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' CSM cases in the last 12 months (target: 500+). Now Assist CSM AI learning will have limited pattern coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' CSM cases in the last 12 months. Insufficient case history for meaningful Now Assist CSM AI summarization and similar case matching.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Sufficient CSM case history enables Now Assist to learn customer patterns and power AI similar case suggestions.","remediation_guidance":"Allow CSM case volume to accumulate. Focus on data quality: descriptions, account linkage, and resolution notes. Target: 500+ cases in the trailing 12 months for meaningful Now Assist CSM AI learning.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Case Resolution Notes","order":"40","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in the last 12 months. Resolution note coverage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaMissing.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaMissing.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissing.addQuery('resolution_notes', '');
    gaMissing.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissing.query();
    var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var populated = total - missing;
    var pct = Math.round((populated / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases have resolution notes (last 12 months, ' + populated + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 85) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases have resolution notes. Now Assist CSM summarization has strong resolution context for AI-generated case summaries.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 60) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have resolution notes (target: 85%). Now Assist CSM summarization quality will be reduced for cases missing this data.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: missing + ' closed CSM cases missing resolution notes (' + pct + '% populated). Critical gap — Now Assist CSM cannot generate meaningful case summaries without resolution context.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CSM resolution notes are the primary signal for Now Assist CSM case summarization.","remediation_guidance":"Make resolution notes mandatory at CSM case closure via UI policy. Train agents to document resolution steps clearly. Target: 85%+ of closed cases with resolution notes in the trailing 12 months.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Knowledge Base Coverage","order":"50","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check all published active KB articles — Now Assist CSM AI Search
    // indexes across all accessible KBs regardless of KB name
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    ga.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active KB articles';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published KB articles. Now Assist CSM AI Search has sufficient content for customer-facing self-service deflection.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles (target: 50+). Now Assist CSM AI Search coverage will be limited — expand KB content for key customer inquiry categories.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles. Insufficient KB content for meaningful Now Assist CSM AI Search and self-service deflection.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CSM KB articles are the primary source for Now Assist CSM AI Search and case deflection.","remediation_guidance":"Create KB articles covering top customer inquiry categories. Target: 50+ published active articles. Now Assist CSM AI Search indexes all accessible KBs — focus on quality and coverage over KB naming conventions.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM SLA Configuration","order":"60","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sla');
    ga.addQuery('table', 'CONTAINS', 'sn_customerservice');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active CSM SLA definitions';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active CSM SLAs. Now Assist CSM can prioritize cases using AI-driven SLA breach risk analysis.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active CSM SLA(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist CSM SLA-based AI prioritization will have limited differentiation across case types and customer tiers.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active CSM SLAs defined. Now Assist CSM cannot differentiate case urgency for AI prioritization without SLA definitions.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CSM SLAs provide urgency signals Now Assist uses for AI-driven case prioritization.","remediation_guidance":"Configure CSM SLAs for each case type and customer tier. Target: 5+ active SLA definitions. Now Assist CSM uses SLA breach risk for AI case prioritization.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Agent Workspace Configuration","order":"70","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_plugins');
    ga.addQuery('name', 'CSM Workspace');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: 'CSM Workspace plugin is active',
            finding: 'CSM Workspace is active. Now Assist CSM AI features — including case summarization and similar case suggestions — are visible to agents.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'CSM Workspace plugin not found or inactive',
            finding: 'CSM Workspace is not active. Now Assist CSM AI features surface exclusively in the CSM Workspace — agents cannot see AI insights without it.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Agent Workspace is where Now Assist CSM AI features (summaries, suggested responses, next best actions) surface to agents.","remediation_guidance":"Activate CSM Workspace via sys_plugins_list.do. Configure workspace views and layouts for your CSM agent teams. Now Assist CSM AI features are delivered exclusively through the CSM Workspace.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Customer Portal Configuration","order":"80","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check for any active Service Portal — CSM portal naming varies by org
    // Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA require an active portal to reach customers
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sp_portal');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Service Portal(s) configured';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active portal(s) configured. Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA can be delivered to customers via the portal.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active customer portals configured. Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA cannot reach customers without an active Service Portal.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"The customer portal is the primary channel for Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA. Without it Now Assist cannot reach customers.","remediation_guidance":"Configure and activate a Customer Service Portal via sp_portal_list.do. Enable AI Search and VA on the portal. Test customer-facing Now Assist AI features end-to-end.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Case Categorization Quality","order":"90","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in the last 12 months. Case categorization quality cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaCat = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaCat.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaCat.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaCat.addQuery('category', '!=', '');
    gaCat.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCat.query();
    var categorized = gaCat.next() ? parseInt(gaCat.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((categorized / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases categorized (last 12 months, ' + categorized + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 85) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases have a category. Now Assist CSM has strong classification signal for AI routing and similar case matching.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 60) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases are categorized (target: 85%). Now Assist CSM AI routing and similar case matching will have reduced accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of CSM cases are categorized. Insufficient classification signal — Now Assist CSM AI routing requires consistent category data.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CSM case categories are the primary classification signal for Now Assist routing and similar case matching.","remediation_guidance":"Standardize CSM categories and enforce selection via UI policy at case creation. Target: 85%+ of closed cases categorized. Now Assist CSM uses category for AI routing and similar case recommendations.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Entitlement Contracts","order":"100","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_entitlement_contract');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active entitlement contracts';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active entitlement contracts. Now Assist CSM can provide entitlement-aware AI responses tailored to each customer\'s service agreement.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active entitlement contract(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist CSM entitlement-aware AI personalization will have limited coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active entitlement contracts. Now Assist CSM cannot provide entitlement-aware personalized AI responses without contract data.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Entitlement contracts link customer cases to contracted service levels. Now Assist uses contract data for personalized AI service delivery.","remediation_guidance":"Configure customer entitlement contracts via sn_customerservice_entitlement_contract_list.do. Link contracts to accounts. Target: 5+ active contracts. Now Assist CSM uses contract data for AI-personalized service delivery.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Case Sentiment Data","order":"110","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in last 12 months. Sentiment data coverage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaSentiment = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaSentiment.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaSentiment.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaSentiment.addQuery('sentiment', '!=', '');
    gaSentiment.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaSentiment.query();
    var withSentiment = gaSentiment.next() ? parseInt(gaSentiment.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withSentiment / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases have sentiment data (last 12 months, ' + withSentiment + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases have sentiment data. Now Assist CSM has sufficient signal for proactive AI escalation and sentiment-aware responses.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have sentiment data (target: 50%+). Now Assist CSM proactive escalation recommendations will have limited sentiment coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have sentiment data. Now Assist CSM cannot provide meaningful sentiment-aware AI responses without this signal.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Customer sentiment enables Now Assist to prioritize at-risk customers and generate empathetic AI responses.","remediation_guidance":"Enable customer sentiment analysis on CSM cases. Configure sentiment capture at case creation and during interaction. Target: 50%+ of closed cases with sentiment data. Now Assist CSM uses sentiment for proactive AI escalation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Omnichannel Configuration","order":"120","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // sys_cs_live_agent_setup records only exist when omnichannel/chat
    // is actively configured — reliable functional evidence
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_live_agent_setup');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active omnichannel live agent setup record(s)';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Omnichannel is configured and active. Now Assist CSM can engage customers across all configured channels with AI-assisted responses.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active omnichannel configuration found. Now Assist CSM AI engagement is limited to portal without omnichannel — customers on chat, email, and messaging channels will not receive AI-assisted responses.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Omnichannel routing ensures Now Assist AI can engage customers across all channels (chat, email, portal).","remediation_guidance":"Configure omnichannel routing in the CSM Workspace. Enable chat, email, and portal channels. Now Assist CSM AI capabilities extend across all configured omnichannel touchpoints.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Assignment Group Coverage","order":"130","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    // Collect distinct assignment groups used on CSM cases in last 12 months
    var usedGroups = {};
    var grCases = new GlideRecord('sn_customerservice_case');
    grCases.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    grCases.addQuery('assignment_group', '!=', '');
    grCases.query();
    while (grCases.next()) {
        usedGroups[grCases.getValue('assignment_group')] = true;
    }

    var groupIds = Object.keys(usedGroups);
    var totalGroups = groupIds.length;

    if (totalGroups === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'No assignment groups used on CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No assignment groups found on CSM cases in the last 12 months. Now Assist CSM AI routing has no group structure to route cases to.'
        };
    }

    // Check which of those groups have active members
    var groupsWithMembers = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < groupIds.length; i++) {
        var memGr = new GlideRecord('sys_user_grmember');
        memGr.addQuery('group', groupIds[i]);
        memGr.setLimit(1);
        memGr.query();
        if (memGr.next()) groupsWithMembers++;
    }

    var pct = Math.round((groupsWithMembers / totalGroups) * 100);
    var actualValue = totalGroups + ' CSM assignment groups used (last 12 months) | ' + groupsWithMembers + ' with active members (' + pct + '%)';

    if (groupsWithMembers >= 3 && pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: groupsWithMembers + ' populated CSM assignment groups. Now Assist CSM AI routing has well-defined, staffed groups to route cases to.'
        };
    } else if (groupsWithMembers >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + groupsWithMembers + ' of ' + totalGroups + ' CSM assignment groups have members. Now Assist CSM AI routing may attempt to assign cases to empty groups.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CSM assignment groups have active members. Now Assist CSM AI routing cannot function without populated assignment groups.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CSM assignment groups are used for Now Assist AI routing. Groups without members create silent AI routing failures.","remediation_guidance":"Populate CSM assignment groups with active agents. Assign group managers. Ensure all groups used on CSM cases have at least one active member. Now Assist CSM AI routing depends on well-populated assignment groups.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Product Catalog Linkage","order":"140","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in the last 12 months. Product linkage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithProd = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaWithProd.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaWithProd.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaWithProd.addQuery('product', '!=', '');
    gaWithProd.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithProd.query();
    var withProd = gaWithProd.next() ? parseInt(gaWithProd.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withProd / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases have product linked (last 12 months, ' + withProd + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases have a product linked. Now Assist CSM can provide product-specific AI troubleshooting guidance.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 40) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have a product linked (target: 70%). Now Assist CSM product-specific AI guidance will be limited for cases without product context.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of CSM cases have a product linked. Now Assist CSM cannot provide targeted AI troubleshooting without product context.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Product linkage on CSM cases enables Now Assist to provide product-specific AI troubleshooting suggestions.","remediation_guidance":"Link CSM cases to product catalog items at case creation. Import product data from authoritative sources. Target: 70%+ of closed cases linked to a product. Now Assist CSM uses product context for targeted AI troubleshooting suggestions.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CSM","check_name":"CSM Customization Risk","order":"150","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBR = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    gaBR.addQuery('collection', 'sn_customerservice_case');
    gaBR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaBR.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaBR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBR.query();
    var brs = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCS = new GlideAggregate('sys_script_client');
    gaCS.addQuery('table', 'sn_customerservice_case');
    gaCS.addQuery('active', true);
    gaCS.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaCS.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCS.query();
    var cs = gaCS.next() ? parseInt(gaCS.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var risk = brs + cs;
    var actualValue = brs + ' custom BRs + ' + cs + ' client scripts on sn_customerservice_case (risk score: ' + risk + ')';

    if (risk <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low CSM customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Now Assist CSM AI Agent actions are unlikely to encounter conflicts with existing customizations.'
        };
    } else if (risk <= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Moderate CSM customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Test Now Assist CSM in sub-production before enabling in production to identify conflicts.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High CSM customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Extensive customization on sn_customerservice_case increases the risk of conflicts with Now Assist CSM AI Agent actions.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Custom business rules on CSM tables can conflict with Now Assist CSM AI Agent actions.","remediation_guidance":"Review custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on sn_customerservice_case. Test Now Assist CSM with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant scripts before Now Assist go-live.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_CSM'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:22</sys_created_on><sys_id>5e504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc0</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_CSM</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_5e504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc0</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
